headings.text: Ship words as fast as you ship code

paragraphs.text: Luminos is the AI writing copilot for product teams. Connect Notion and Jira, and turn messy tickets into polished release notes, changelogs, and customer emails in seconds.
The AI writing copilot that turns your team's product chatter into ship-ready prose.
